title: Revival Orb
description: Adds a way for Hardcore players to revive their dead friends
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qR762rGa/images/6c13529bc515f168d3973232865641d6d9ef66c8.gif)

Are you playing Hardcore SMP but you want a way to revive your friends? Craft a Revival Orb, right click with it, and the Spectator Ghost of your friend will be revived at spawn!
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qR762rGa/images/6a443e18afed95a0dd0468eb48a0dafb450383f7.png)
Expensive recipe uses netherite blocks, cheaper uses ingots.
